mapper.select: SELECT LICENSE_CODE as licenseCode, LICENSE_NAME as licenseName FROM LICENSE ORDER BY LICENSE_CODE ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUESTION WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND LICENSE_CODE = #{licenseCode}
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT Q.*, L.LICENSE_NAME as licenseName FROM QUESTION Q JOIN LICENSE L ON (Q.LICENSE_CODE = L.LICENSE_CODE) WHERE Q.STATUS = 'Y'
AND Q.LICENSE_CODE = #{licenseCode}
AND Q.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND Q.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY Q_INDEX DESC
SELECT Q.*, L.LICENSE_NAME as licenseName FROM QUESTION Q JOIN LICENSE L ON (Q.LICENSE_CODE = L.LICENSE_CODE) WHERE Q.Q_INDEX = #{qIndex} AND Q.STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT Q.*, L.LICENSE_NAME as licenseName FROM QUESTION Q JOIN LICENSE L ON (Q.LICENSE_CODE = L.LICENSE_CODE) WHERE Q.Q_INDEX = #{qIndex} AND Q.STATUS != 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE Q_INDEX = #{qIndex}
UPDATE QUESTION SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE Q_INDEX = #{qIndex}
mapper.select: SELECT A_INDEX as aIndex, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE as createDate, STATUS, Q_INDEX as qIndex, USER_ID as userId FROM ANSWER WHERE Q_INDEX = #{qIndex} AND STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY A_INDEX DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUESTION ( Q_INDEX, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, STATUS, LICENSE_CODE, USER_ID, COUNT ) VALUES ( SEQ_QNO.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{licenseCode}, #{userId}, 0 )
